name: My Perfect Hotel
author: Poki
description: My Perfect Hotel is an idle game where you get to run your dream hotel! Check in guests, clean rooms, collect payments and tips, and ensure the bathrooms are always stocked with toilet paper. Upgrade your hotel rooms, expand your business, and hire employees to assist with various tasks. Develop your skills as a manager, investor, and designer! Are you ready to build your own accommodation empire? How to play My Perfect Hotel? Run around the hotel for different tasks! Move with WASD, the arrow keys, or your finger. Who created My Perfect Hotel? My Perfect Hotel is created by SayGames. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play My Perfect Hotel for free? You can play My Perfect Hotel for free on Poki. Can I play My Perfect Hotel on mobile devices and desktop? My Perfect Hotel can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
